title: Doemia scandens

uses: Doemia scandens is a plant species used in traditional medicine, particularly in its native range of Southeast Asia. Its medicinal uses include treating various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to alleviate these ailments. Additionally, Doemia scandens is also used in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. More research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential benefits.
